name: reflector
description: A local-first web app for your Google Calendar. Reads your calendar into a local JSON copy you can browse, edit, sync back, and download as a ZIP.

OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client id (from the Google Cloud console).

BASE_URL.description: Public origin of this app, e.g. https://reflector-prod.herokuapp.com (or your custom domain). Used to build the OAuth redirect URI, so it must match the app's real URL and the authorized redirect URI on the OAuth client.
